description: Build The Block is a reality show in the metaverse where 12 startup founders pitch their Web3 ideas to judges and an audience for investment backing. The show features insights from industry leaders and aims to elevate innovative blockchain projects.
topic_summary: In this episode, the host Justin Bratton introduces the concept of Build The Block, highlighting the competition among Web3 startups and the role of judges and audience in the investment process. Founders pitch their ideas to gain support and feedback from industry experts [t=1:76].
